name: enCore Energy Corp.
description: enCore Energy Corp. is a leading U.S. domestic uranium developer and producer, focused on becoming a primary clean energy fuel provider. The company utilizes In-Situ Recovery (ISR) technology to extract uranium, a proven and environmentally friendly process. enCore Energy operates multiple licensed uranium production facilities in Texas and is actively developing advanced projects in Wyoming, South Dakota, and New Mexico, alongside a robust portfolio of uranium resource assets across the United States.
